title: [nonroot] podman run --cidfile: fails with 'container id file exists'
body:
```
$ rm -f /tmp/nonesuch
$ podman run -d --cidfile /tmp/nonesuch alpine date
container id file exists. ensure another container is not using it or delete /tmp/nonesuch
$ ls -l /tmp/nonesuch
-rw-rw-r--. 1 fedora fedora 0 Oct 24 16:43 /tmp/nonesuch         (that is: podman creates the file)
```
Works as expected when run as root.

podman-0.10.1.3-2.gitdb08685.fc29
